body_txt: Mecha are cool. Some animals are pretty awesome. But what if we combine both? Animal mecha are, simply put, mecha built in the shape of animals. They are usually modeled after creatures considered badass, especially dinosaurs, dragons , predatory beasts ( often big cats ), and birds of prey . There are two subtypes of animal mecha:  Mecha based on aquatic creatures tend to be prone to If It Swims, It Flies . Compare Spider Tank , Mechanical Horse , Mechanical Insects , Mechanical Animals , and Robot Dog . A common form of the Robeast . For robots with bird-like legs, see the Chicken Walker . Sometimes overlaps with Bio-Mecha .
